memberdef.argsstring: (PointsHost &h_points, PointsDevice &dev_points, const Kernel &kernel, Queue &queue, std::size_t block_size)
memberdef.name: make_clusters_impl

memberdef.argsstring: (DistanceParameter< Ndim > dc, float rhoc, DistanceParameter< Ndim > dm=-1.f, DistanceParameter< Ndim > seed_dc=-1.f, int pPBin=128)
memberdef.name: Clusterer

parameterdescription.para: Distance threshold for clustering. This parameter can be a single float or an array of floats specifying the distance threshold for each dimension.
Density threshold for clustering
Minimum distance between clusters. This parameter can be a single float or an array of floats specifying the distance threshold for each dimension.
Distance threshold for seed points, if -1.f, dc is used. This parameter can be a single float or an array of floats specifying the distance threshold for each dimension.
Number of points per bin, used to determine the tile size

memberdef.argsstring: (Queue &queue, DistanceParameter< Ndim > dc, float rhoc, DistanceParameter< Ndim > dm=-1.f, DistanceParameter< Ndim > seed_dc=-1.f, int pPBin=128)
memberdef.name: Clusterer

parameterdescription.para: The queue to use for the device operations
Distance threshold for clustering. This parameter can be a single float or an array of floats specifying the distance threshold for each dimension.
Density threshold for clustering
Minimum distance between clusters. This parameter can be a single float or an array of floats specifying the distance threshold for each dimension.
Distance threshold for seed points, if the default value -1.f, dc is used. This parameter can be a single float or an array of floats specifying the distance threshold for each dimension.
Number of points per bin, used to determine the tile size

memberdef.argsstring: (DistanceParameter< Ndim > dc, float rhoc, DistanceParameter< Ndim > dm=-1.f, DistanceParameter< Ndim > seed_dc=-1.f, int pPBin=128)
memberdef.name: setParameters

briefdescription.para: Set the parameters for the clustering algorithm.

parameterdescription.para: Distance threshold for clustering
Density threshold for clustering
Minimum distance between clusters
Distance threshold for seed points, if the defualt value -1.f, dc is used
Number of points per bin, used to determine the tile size

briefdescription.para: Construct the clusters from host points.

parameterdescription.para: The queue to use for the device operations
Host points to cluster
The convolutional kernel to use for computing the local densities, default is FlatKernel with height 0.5
The size of the blocks to use for clustering, default is 256

briefdescription.para: Construct the clusters from host points.

parameterdescription.para: Host points to cluster
The convolutional kernel to use for computing the local densities, default is FlatKernel with height 0.5
The size of the blocks to use for clustering, default is 256

simplesect.para: This method creates a temporary queue for the operations on the device

memberdef.argsstring: (Queue &queue, PointsHost &h_points, PointsDevice &dev_points, const Kernel &kernel=FlatKernel{.5f}, std::size_t block_size=256)
memberdef.name: make_clusters

briefdescription.para: Construct the clusters from host and device points.

parameterdescription.para: The queue to use for the device operations
Host points to cluster
Device points to cluster
The convolutional kernel to use for computing the local densities, default is FlatKernel with height 0.5
The size of the blocks to use for clustering, default is 256

briefdescription.para: Construct the clusters from device points.

parameterdescription.para: The queue to use for the device operations
Device points to cluster
The convolutional kernel to use for computing the local densities, default is FlatKernel with height 0.5
The size of the blocks to use for clustering, default is 256
Array of wrapped coordinates, where 1 means periodic and 0 means non-periodic
Types of the wrapped coordinates, should be convertible to uint8_t
Wrapped coordinates, where 1 means periodic and 0 means non-periodic

briefdescription.para: Get the clusters from the host points.

parameterdescription.para: Host points

simplesect.para: An associator mapping clusters and points

briefdescription.para: Get the clusters from the device points This function returns an associator object mapping the clusters to the points they contain.

parameterdescription.para: Device points

simplesect.para: An associator mapping clusters and points

briefdescription.para: The Clusterer class is the interface for running the clustering algorithm. It provides methods to set up the clustering parameters, initializes the internal buffers and runs the clustering algorithm on host or device points.

parameterdescription.para: The number of dimensions of the points to cluster
